items.description: Salvaged plate and fittings. Staple for improvised tools and weapons.
Short offcuts and splintered boards. Good for handles and crude clubs.
Industrial tape. Binds grips, patches hulls, fixes morale.
Moldable stock. Used for durable grips and impact pads.
Multi-purpose steel wire. Locks guards, lashes heads to hafts.
Small sealed ampoule. Etches, hardens, or cleans metal before assembly.
